name: Old Fashioned Apple-Blueberry Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Granny Smith apples, peeled and cored and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a quart saucepan, melt butter and whipping cream over low heat, stirring occasionally. Set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine sugar and eggs. Beat with an electric mixer on medium speed, scraping the bowl often until well mixed.
4. Add the butter mixture, flour, baking powder, and salt to the bowl. Continue beating, scraping the bowl often until smooth.
5. By hand, stir in apples and blueberries.
6. Spread the batter into a greased and floured 13 x 9-inch baking pan.
7. Bake for 45-55 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Serve warm with sweetened whipping cream. Yield: 15 servings.
